languages.text: {n}Детали пазла с щелчком складываются: речь идет о роде Гапрак, отправивших на помощь Даргонусу армию во главе с одним из потомков. Похоже, причиной унитожения сил Гарпаков стала точная наводка той самой "Эланы", и сейчас она же передает координаты для орбитального удара по командному штабу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Детали пазла с щелчком складываются: речь идет о роде Гапрак, отправивших на помощь Даргонусу армию во главе с одним из потомков. Похоже, причиной унитожения сил Гарпаков стала точная наводка той самой "Эланы", и сейчас она же передает координаты для орбитального удара по командному штабу.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Детали пазла с щелчком складываются: речь идет о роде Гапрак, отправивших на помощь Даргонусу армию во главе с одним из потомков. Похоже, причиной унитожения сил Гарпаков стала точная наводка той самой "Эланы", и сейчас она же передает координаты для орбитального удара по командному штабу.{/n}

{n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你脑海中的线索突然汇集在一起：他们说的是贾帕克家族。这个家族派出了一支由他们的继承人率领的军队，前来支援达戈努斯。看来贾帕克家的军队已被这位“埃拉娜”除掉，而此刻她正向敌方提供针对指挥部实施轨道打击的坐标。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你脑海中的线索突然汇集在一起：他们说的是贾帕克家族。这个家族派出了一支由他们的继承人率领的军队，前来支援达戈努斯。看来贾帕克家的军队已被这位“埃拉娜”除掉，而此刻她正向敌方提供针对指挥部实施轨道打击的坐标。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les pièces du puzzle se mettent soudain en place : ils parlent de la maison Gaprak, qui a envoyé l'un de ses héritiers sur Dargonus à la tête d'une armée pour défendre la planète. Il semblerait que leurs troupes aient été éliminées par cette « Elana », qui transmet à présent les coordonnées du quartier général de commandement en vue d'une frappe orbitale.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les pièces du puzzle se mettent soudain en place : ils parlent de la maison Gaprak, qui a envoyé l'un de ses héritiers sur Dargonus à la tête d'une armée pour défendre la planète. Il semblerait que leurs troupes aient été éliminées par cette « Elana », qui transmet à présent les coordonnées du quartier général de commandement en vue d'une frappe orbitale.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Yapbozun parçaları aniden yerine oturuyor... Dargonus'un yardımına torunlarından birinin önderliğinde bir ordu gönderen Gaprak Hanesi'nden bahsediyorlar. Görünüşe göre Gaprak kuvvetleri, bu "Elana" tarafından yok edilmiş. Elana şimdi de komuta karargâhına yapılacak yörüngesel saldırı için koordinatları iletiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Yapbozun parçaları aniden yerine oturuyor... Dargonus'un yardımına torunlarından birinin önderliğinde bir ordu gönderen Gaprak Hanesi'nden bahsediyorlar. Görünüşe göre Gaprak kuvvetleri, bu "Elana" tarafından yok edilmiş. Elana şimdi de komuta karargâhına yapılacak yörüngesel saldırı için koordinatları iletiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}De pronto, las piezas del puzle encajan. Se refieren a la casa Gaprak, que envió un ejército liderado por uno de sus herederos para que apoyara Dargonus. Parece que las fuerzas de Gaprak han sido eliminadas por la tal «Elana», que ahora envía las coordenadas para un ataque orbital contra el centro de mando.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}De pronto, las piezas del puzle encajan. Se refieren a la casa Gaprak, que envió un ejército liderado por uno de sus herederos para que apoyara Dargonus. Parece que las fuerzas de Gaprak han sido eliminadas por la tal «Elana», que ahora envía las coordenadas para un ataque orbital contra el centro de mando.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Plötzlich fügen sich alle Teile des Puzzles zusammen: Sie reden über Haus Gaprak, das eine Armee unter dem Befehl eines seiner Erben nach Dargonus entsandt hat. Wie es scheint, wurden die Truppen der Gaprak von dieser 'Elana' eliminiert, und nun übermittelt sie Koordinaten für den Angriff auf das Hauptquartier.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Plötzlich fügen sich alle Teile des Puzzles zusammen: Sie reden über Haus Gaprak, das eine Armee unter dem Befehl eines seiner Erben nach Dargonus entsandt hat. Wie es scheint, wurden die Truppen der Gaprak von dieser 'Elana' eliminiert, und nun übermittelt sie Koordinaten für den Angriff auf das Hauptquartier.{/n}

languages.text: {n}パズルが突然はめ合い、話の内容がわかる。ガプラク家の軍勢を率いてドラゴンスの救援に駆けつけたのは、ガプラク家の家臣だった。この「エラーナ」によってガプラク家の軍勢は全滅し、今は彼女の伝えた位置情報で軌道上の攻撃を指揮本部に行うらしい。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The pieces of the puzzle suddenly click into place: they are talking about House Gaprak, who sent an army led by one of their scions to Dargonus's aid. It seems the Gaprak forces were eliminated by this "Elana," and now she is relaying coordinates for an orbital strike on the command headquarters.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}パズルが突然はめ合い、話の内容がわかる。ガプラク家の軍勢を率いてドラゴンスの救援に駆けつけたのは、ガプラク家の家臣だった。この「エラーナ」によってガプラク家の軍勢は全滅し、今は彼女の伝えた位置情報で軌道上の攻撃を指揮本部に行うらしい。{/n}
